mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_schedule (course_id, teacher_id, start_time, end_time, repeat_type, repeat_interval, repeat_days, repeat_end_date, description) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{teacherId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{repeatType}, #{repeatInterval}, #{repeatDays}, #{repeatEndDate}, #{description})
mapper.update:
UPDATE course_schedule
course_id = #{courseId},
teacher_id = #{teacherId},
start_time = #{startTime},
end_time = #{endTime},
repeat_type = #{repeatType},
repeat_interval = #{repeatInterval},
repeat_days = #{repeatDays},
repeat_end_date = #{repeatEndDate},
description = #{description},
WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM course_schedule WHERE status = 1 AND (teacher_id = #{teacherId} ) AND start_time < #{endTime} -- 新排期开始 < 已有排期结束 AND end_time > #{startTime} -- 新排期结束 > 已有排期开始
AND id != #{excludeScheduleId}
